snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    api_version="YOUR_API_VERSION",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.test_get(
    region="region",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    api_version="YOUR_API_VERSION",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.test_get(
        region="region",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
